title: Breeding Potion
description: A lightweight mod that adds a potion to make mobs willing to breed.
body:
# Abstract
Potion of breeding, which is added by this mod, can be made from potion of regeneration and a special ingredient (enchanted golden apple by default).

This breeding effect from the potion can make animals and villagers willing to breed to automate breeding. For mobs who cannot breed, the effect can make them slowly regain health, while it can make players slowly regain hunger value and saturation.

# Configuration
The config is located at `config/breedingpotion-common.toml`.

You can change the special ingredient to make breeding potion by editing `INGREDIENT_BREWING` field in the config (default enchanted golden apple).

Some mobs that added by other mods may abnormally splash "heart particles" but can never breed. You can add them into `IGNORE_ANIMALS` field in the config (default only polar bears).
